---
title: "pennyone.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/bin/pennyone.js"
loc: 111
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.52
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 3.20
overall_score: 3.54
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 36 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Command](file://commander)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [runScan](file://../src/tools/pennyone/index.ts)
- [P1Daemon](file://../src/tools/pennyone/daemon.ts)
- [startProxy](file://../src/tools/pennyone/vis/proxy.ts)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [registry](file://../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `program`
- `results`
- `daemon`
- `statsDir`
- `pidFile`
- `pid`
- `statsDir`
- `pidFile`
- `pid`
- `statsDir`
- `graphPath`
- `graph`
- `knownFiles`
- `reportFiles`
- `removed`
